title: Fire Department Equipment, EMS Ambulance Billing, First Responder Wellness, and Training Center Usage
summary: Multiple fire and police items: (1) SPD Deputy Chief presents CBH Group agreement for first responder resiliency speaker event hosted jointly with Onondaga County Sheriff's Department; (2) Fire Chief requests aerial ladder truck purchase under regular replacement program — 10-truck fleet with 10-year frontline/15-year total lifecycle, rotating by station usage; (3) Multimed third-party ambulance billing contract extension — Fire Dept has operated ambulance service since 1950s, expanded full-time during pandemic due to private ambulance staffing shortages, 2 ambulances with ~40 paramedics and 300+ EMTs; (4) NYSAFC annual conference hosting at training center for $8,500. Council requests apparatus replacement data and training center revenue history.
